$description: 50 diverse 3D game prompts to exercise the web-components-3d catalog (Phase 3D-LEGO-EXPANSION). Each targets a recipe + components. Run sequentially overnight via the baton; >=10 min/job. difficulty L2 forces the full assembler (L1 fast-paths bypass it). artifactType miniApp avoids macOS-classifier downgrade.

prompts.goal: build a 3D endless runner where you dodge obstacles down a neon canyon, swiping between three lanes and jumping over barriers
build a 3D temple-run style chase: sprint forward through ancient ruins, slide under arches and leap gaps, speed ramps up over time
build a 3D subway surfer clone where you outrun a pursuer, grab coins, and switch tracks to avoid trains
build a 3D marble roll game: tilt to guide a glass ball through a floating maze to the goal hole without falling off
build a 3D ball-balance labyrinth where you steer a marble across narrow beams collecting gems, lose if you drop
build a 3D tower defense: place cannon turrets on a grid to stop waves of creeps marching to your base
build a 3D castle defense where you build turrets along a winding path and survive escalating monster waves
build a 3D first-person arena shooter: drag to look, WASD to move, blast waves of hovering drones before they reach you
build a 3D doom-style dungeon crawler: walk through corridors with drag-to-look, shoot skeletons, find the exit
build a 3D first-person zombie survival shooter in a foggy courtyard, ammo pickups, escalating horde
build a 3D minecraft-style voxel sandbox: walk around, mine blocks, and place blocks to build structures
build a 3D block-world explorer where you dig tunnels and stack cubes on a procedurally generated terrain
build a 3D kart racer: drive a go-kart around a banked track, drift through corners, beat your lap time
build a 3D mini golf game: aim and putt a ball across themed greens with ramps and obstacles into the cup
build a 3D pinball table with bumpers, flippers, and ramps, physics-driven ball, score multipliers
build a low-poly floating island diorama you can orbit with the mouse: trees, a waterfall, a tiny windmill turning
build a low-poly papercraft village scene on a hill that slowly auto-rotates, with a day-night color shift
build a 3D top-down action RPG: explore grassy terrain, fight animated wolves with a sword, collect loot gems
build a 3D zelda-like adventure where you roam a low-poly world, battle skeletons and a boss dragon, gain levels
build a 3D dungeon-crawler RPG: descend rooms full of goblins and spiders, animated melee combat, find the treasure
build a 3D wave-survival arena: animated creatures spawn in escalating waves, mow them down, survive as long as you can
build a 3D vampire-survivors style game: auto-attack a swarming horde of wolves and slimes on open terrain, level up
build a 3D last-stand defense where endless skeletons close in from all sides and you fend them off with screen-shake on hits
build a 3D arcade flight game: bank a low-poly plane through floating rings over rolling terrain, beat the clock
build a 3D space dogfight: pilot a fighter, chase and shoot enemy ships among asteroids, chase camera behind you
build a 3D barnstormer: fly a biplane low over hills and through canyons collecting balloons, propeller spinning
build a 3D flappy-style flyer in 3D space: tap to flap a low-poly bird through gaps between floating pillars
build a 3D first-person parkour course: drag-look, WASD, jump across platforms to reach the finish before time runs out
build a 3D hack-and-slash where you spin-attack groups of animated boars and orcs on a forest map, combo counter
build a 3D tower-survival: stand on a shrinking platform and blast waves of flying drones, particle explosions on kills
build a 3D maze tower defense where you also dig the creep path, then place turrets, animated creatures walk it
build a 3D monkey-ball style game: roll a ball inside a tilting world toward the goal, avoid edges, time limit
build a 3D bowling game: swipe to roll the ball down the lane, knock down pins with physics, ten frames
build a 3D plinko / pachinko board: drop a ball and watch it bounce through pegs into scoring slots
build a 3D collectathon: a low-poly character runs and jumps around an island grabbing coins and gems, animated idle and run
build a 3D first-person tower climb: ascend a spiral fortress fighting drones on each floor, reach the top
build a 3D helicopter rescue: hover and maneuver to pick up stranded figures on rooftops, land them safely
build a 3D bug-swarm survival on a kitchen-table arena: squash waves of animated spiders, combo and screen-shake juice
build a 3D downhill snowboard run: carve left and right down a slope dodging trees and rocks, speed lines
build a 3D fantasy arena duel: face a boss dragon one-on-one, dodge fire, strike when it lands, health bars
build a 3D voxel tower-builder: stack and carve blocks to reach a height goal before time runs out
build a low-poly orbiting solar-system toy: tap a planet to focus, moons orbit, gentle ambient feel
build a 3D bridge defense: turrets on both banks, animated creatures stream across a bridge, boss wave at the end
build a 3D ice-slide puzzle: nudge a ball that slides until it hits a wall, reach the goal in fewest moves
build a 3D meteor-survival: a low-poly hero dashes around dodging falling rocks while grabbing power-ups, time score
build a 3D first-person target range: drag-look and click to shoot pop-up targets for a high score, combo timer
build a 3D drone-racing course: fly an FPV-style drone through neon gates over a city grid against a countdown
build a 3D top-down twin-stick shooter: move with one stick, aim with the other, mow down animated slimes and bats
build a 3D skee-ball alley: flick a ball up the ramp to land in concentric scoring rings, nine balls per game
build a 3D boss-rush: fight three escalating animated bosses (wolf pack, then ogre, then dragon) back to back with a health bar and restart
